description: Composition:Leathershoe care:Use a branded shoe polish to keep your leather footwear clean and shiny.Fitting:Regular.These beautiful brown leather shoes from red tape with the tapered toe box, glossy mahogany brown leather and sleek Velcro straps are perfect when teamed up with casuals or for Friday dressing.
